description: Native `ko-*` binding accessors attached directly to DOM nodes.

behaviors.statement: `NativeProvider` only recognizes entries stored under `NATIVE_BINDINGS` whose keys start with `ko-`.
notes: Nodes without the symbol, or with only non-`ko-*` entries, report no bindings.

behaviors.statement: `NativeProvider.getBindingAccessors(node)` returns value accessors that read observables and write back through writable observables.
`NativeProvider` is preemptive: when native bindings are present, it outranks `data-bind` and mustache providers.
notes: It does not preempt those providers when the native binding bag is empty or contains no `ko-*` entries.
